Name: TankBaseParam
Description: Fields related to tank wheels and treads.

Fields.Name: Texture Scroll: Movement Scale
Fields.Description: Movement speed until the scroll completes one revolution (Km/h)

Fields.Name: Texture Scroll: Rotation Scale
Fields.Description: Rotating speed until the scroll completes one revolution (rad/frame)

Fields.Name: Left: Forward Animation ID
Fields.Description: Animation ID of the wheel part when moving forward

Fields.Name: Left: Backward Animation ID
Fields.Description: Animation ID of the wheel part when moving backwards

Fields.Name: Right: Forward Animation ID
Fields.Description: Animation ID of the wheel part when moving forward

Fields.Name: Right: Backward Animation ID
Fields.Description: Animation ID of the wheel part when moving backwards

Fields.Name: Back Left Wheel ID
Fields.Description: The leftmost rear index in the wheel internal control parameters

Fields.Name: Back Right Wheel ID
Fields.Description: The rightmost rear index in the wheel internal control parameters

Fields.Name: Texture Scroll: Movement Scale
Fields.Description: Movement speed until the scroll completes one revolution (Km/h)

Fields.Name: Texture Scroll: Rotation Scale
Fields.Description: Rotating speed until the scroll completes one revolution (rad/frame)

Fields.Name: Foot IK Interpolation Time
Fields.Description: Interpolation time of animation of wheel and belt part when FootIK is enabled/disabled
